apps.name: Browser Picker
apps.subtitle: Rule-based URL router for macOS
apps.description: Route links to the right browser, automatically.
apps.longDescription: Browser Picker intercepts every link you click and sends it to the browser you want. Define rules based on which app opened the link and which domain it points to — open work links in Chrome, personal links in Safari, and sensitive ones in Firefox with incognito mode.
features: Route links by source app and domain pattern
Open in incognito or new window
Menu bar app — no Dock icon
